log: === ROUND 1 ===

→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.

→ Githyanki — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 10 vs DC 14]
Frost Giant attacks Githyanki — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Githyanki — Unarmored Caster HP: 16/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Githyanki — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
